Scenario.Title: s

EventAction_LuaScript.ScriptText:
function spawn_SSM_random()
local spawn_points = { 'RP-28', 'RP-29', 'RP-30' }
local pick_name = spawn_points[ math.random( #spawn_points ) ]
local rp = ScenEdit_GetReferencePoint({ side='Red', name=pick_name })
ScenEdit_AddUnit({ type= 'Facility', unitname = 'SSM', dbid = 1894, side = 'Red', lat = rp.latitude, lon = rp.longitude, }) ScenEdit_SetEMCON('Unit', 'SSM', 'Radar=Active')
end
spawn_SSM_random()

Scenario.GameVersion: Command PE - Premium Edition v2.4.3 - Build 1777
